programs.title: The Last Vermeer
programs.desc: The Netherlands after World War II.The accountability of Nazi criminals and their accomplices continues.A Jew, Joseph Piller (Claes Bang), who fought in the resistance movement, is to deal with the case of stolen works of art.He accuses the eccentric painter Han van Meegeren (Guy Pearce) of collaboration, who hosted Germans at his hedonistic parties and sold them valuable paintings.The artist faces a death sentence.However, he claims that he traded in fakes he created.His exquisitely crafted fakes are indistinguishable from the originals.Although the evidence points to van Meegeren's guilt, and accepting his version would make the brilliant forger a national hero, Piller begins to believe him.Together with her assistant (Vicky Krieps), she tries to prove his innocence, putting her career and good name on the line.Based on facts, the extraordinary story of a Dutch painter and one of the best art forgers in history.It was based on the biography of Han van Meegeren by Jonathan Lopez.

programs.title: You're Cordially Invited
programs.desc: A booking error causes two weddings to take place in one place at the same time.Both families face the challenge of having to share space.However, they have no intention of letting anything stop them from organizing a special ceremony for their loved one.Jim (Will Ferrell), the father of Jenni (Geraldine Viswanathan), who is getting ready to get married, and Margot (Reese Witherspoon), the sister of the second bride, Neve (Meredith Hagner), try to maintain their composure in a difficult situation, but they are still fighting a desperate duel with each other.A comedy directed by Nicholas Stoller, the creator of "Neighbors".

programs.title: The Knick
programs.desc: New York, the first years of the 20th century.Brilliant surgeon Dr. John Thackery (Clive Owen) leads a brave team of young medics at Knickerbocker Hospital.The doctor introduces pioneering medical solutions while struggling with cocaine addiction.His team is making breakthroughs in medicine at a time when antibiotics do not yet exist and patient mortality is terrifyingly high.The group of distinguished medical staff includes, among others:protégé Everett Gallinger (Eric Johnson) and Algernon Edwards (Andre Holland), a promising surgeon from Europe who was included in the team against Thackery's wishes.The series is directed by Oscar winner Steven Soderbergh.

actor: Dr. John W. Thackery - Clive Owen

programs.title: Heated Rivalry
programs.desc: Two ice hockey players, Shane Hollander (Hudson Williams) and Ilya Rozanov (Connor Storrie), are united not only by ambition and the need for competition, but also by a magnetic attraction that neither of them fully understands.What begins as a secret romance between two debutants turns into an extraordinary love journey.Athletes spend eight years chasing fame on the ice rink while trying to deal with their feelings off it.They must decide whether there is room for something as fragile as love in a world of brutal competition.

actor: Man in the Crease Host #2 - Shaun Starr
Man in the Crease Host #1 - Conor McKenna

programs.title: Half Man
programs.desc: 1980s. The life of bullied teenage Niall (Mitchell Robertson) turns upside down when the son of his mother's partner, the fierce and unpredictable Ruben (Stuart Campbell), comes to live with them for a while.Even though they are not related by blood, over time they both become inseparable.However, subsequent events make them move away from each other.Three decades later, Ruben (Richard Gadd) shows up uninvited at Niall's (Jamie Bell) wedding.It soon becomes clear why he reconnected with his long-lost brother.A suggestive story about the fragility of male relationships, brotherhood, betrayal, loyalty and violence.
